name: PT Asuransi Dayin Mitra Tbk
summary: PT Asuransi Dayin Mitra Tbk provides general insurance products and services. It operates through Fire, Marine Hull, Motor Vehicle, Marine Cargo, and Others segments. The company offers fire, motor vehicle, marine cargo, marine hull, heavy and movable equipment, aviation, money, personal accident, micro, travel, freight forwarder liability, and health insurance products, as well as Dayin Usaha, Dayin Rumah, Aman Liburan, and Dayin Travelmate insurance products. It also provides engineering insurance, including contractor's all risks, erection all risks, machinery breakdown, electronic equipment, civil engineering completed risk, deterioration of stock, and boiler and pressure vessel insurance; and liability insurance, such as public liability, employer's liability, workmen compensation, comprehensive general, automobile liability, product liability, and directors and officers liability insurance. The company has 10 branches and 5 marketing offices, which are located in various cities in Indonesia. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Asuransi Dayin Mitra Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Equity Development Investment Tbk.
